en: That same day Jesus went out of the house and sat beside the sea.
zh: 那一天，耶穌從房子裡出來，坐在海邊。

en: And great crowds gathered about him, so that he got into a boat and sat down. And the whole crowd stood on the beach.
zh: 有很多人聚集到他那裡。於是，他上船坐下來，眾人都站在岸上。

en: And he told them many things in parables, saying: "A sower went out to sow.
zh: 他用比喻對眾人講了許多事，說：“有一個撒種的出去撒種。

en: And as he sowed, some seeds fell along the path, and the birds came and devoured them.
zh: 撒的時候，有的落在路旁，小鳥飛來就吃掉了。

en: Other seeds fell on rocky ground, where they did not have much soil, and immediately they sprang up, since they had no depth of soil,
zh: 有的落在泥土不多的石地上，因為泥土不深，很快就長起來。

en: but when the sun rose they were scorched. And since they had no root, they withered away.
zh: 但太陽一出來，就把它曬乾，又因為沒有根就枯萎了。

en: Other seeds fell among thorns, and the thorns grew up and choked them.
zh: 有的落在荊棘裡，荊棘長大了，就把它擠住。

en: Other seeds fell on good soil and produced grain, some a hundredfold, some sixty, some thirty.
zh: 有的落在好土裡，結出果實，有一百倍的，有六十倍的，有三十倍的。

en: He who has ears, let him hear."
zh: 有耳的，就應當聽。”

en: Then the disciples came and said to him, "Why do you speak to them in parables?"
zh: 門徒上前問耶穌：“你對他們講話，為甚麼用比喻呢？”

en: And he answered them, "To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given.
zh: 他回答：“天國的奧祕，只給你們知道，卻不給他們知道。

en: For to the one who has, more will be given, and he will have an abundance, but from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away.
zh: 因為凡是有的，還要給他，他就充足有餘；凡是沒有的，就連他有甚麼也要拿去。

en: This is why I speak to them in parables, because seeing they do not see, and hearing they do not hear, nor do they understand.
zh: 因此，我用比喻對他們講話，因為他們看卻看不見，聽也聽不到，也不明白。

en: Indeed, in their case the prophecy of Isaiah is fulfilled that says: "' You will indeed hear but never understand, and you will indeed see but never perceive.
zh: 以賽亞的預言，正應驗在他們身上，他說： ‘你們聽是聽見了，總是不明白； 看是看見了，總是不領悟。

en: For this people's heart has grown dull, and with their ears they can barely hear, and their eyes they have closed, lest they should see with their eyes and hear with their ears and understand with their heart and turn, and I would heal them.'
zh: 因為這人民的心思遲鈍， 用不靈的耳朵去聽， 又閉上了眼睛； 免得自己眼睛看見，耳朵聽見， 心裡明白，回轉過來， 我就醫好他們。’

en: But blessed are your eyes, for they see, and your ears, for they hear.
zh: “你們的眼睛是有福的，因為可以看見；你們的耳朵是有福的，因為可以聽見。

en: Truly, I say to you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, and did not see it, and to hear what you hear, and did not hear it.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，曾經有許多先知和義人想看你們所看見的，卻沒有看到，想聽你們所聽見的，卻沒有聽到。

en: "Hear then the parable of the sower:
zh: “所以你們要聽這撒種人的比喻。

en: When anyone hears the word of the kingdom and does not understand it, the evil one comes and snatches away what has been sown in his heart. This is what was sown along the path.
zh: 凡是聽了天國的道卻不明白的，那惡者就來把撒在他心中的奪去。這就是撒在路旁的。

en: As for what was sown on rocky ground, this is the one who hears the word and immediately receives it with joy,
zh: 那撒在石地上的，就是人聽了道，立刻歡歡喜喜地接受，

en: yet he has no root in himself, but endures for a while, and when tribulation or persecution arises on account of the word, immediately he falls away.
zh: 可是他裡面沒有根，只是暫時的；一旦為道遭遇患難，受到迫害，就立刻跌倒了。

en: As for what was sown among thorns, this is the one who hears the word, but the cares of the world and the deceitfulness of riches choke the word, and it proves unfruitful.
zh: 那撒在荊棘裡的，就是人聽了道，有今世的憂慮和財富的迷惑把道擠住，結不出果實來。

en: As for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands it. He indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case a hundredfold, in another sixty, and in another thirty."
zh: 那撒在好土裡的，就是人聽了道，又明白了，結出果實來，有一百倍的，有六十倍的，有三十倍的。”

en: He put another parable before them, saying, "The kingdom of heaven may be compared to a man who sowed good seed in his field,
zh: 耶穌對他們另外講了一個比喻，說：“天國好像人把好的種子撒在田裡。

en: but while his men were sleeping, his enemy came and sowed weeds among the wheat and went away.
zh: 人們睡了的時候，他的仇敵來把稗子撒在麥子中間，就走了。

en: So when the plants came up and bore grain, then the weeds appeared also.
zh: 到了發苗吐穗的時候，稗子也顯出來。

en: And the servants of the master of the house came and said to him, 'Master, did you not sow good seed in your field? How then does it have weeds?'
zh: 僕人都前來問家主：‘主人，你不是把好的種子撒在田裡嗎？那些稗子是從哪裡來的呢？’

en: He said to them, 'An enemy has done this.' So the servants said to him, 'Then do you want us to go and gather them?'
zh: 他回答：‘這是仇敵所作的。’僕人問他：‘你要我們去拔掉它嗎？’

en: But he said, 'No, lest in gathering the weeds you root up the wheat along with them.
zh: 他說：‘不用，因為拔稗子的時候，恐怕也把麥子連根拔出來。

en: Let both grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time I will tell the reapers, Gather the weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barn.'"
zh: 收割之前，讓它們一同生長。到了收割的時候，我會吩咐收割的工人先拔掉稗子，捆起來，留著焚燒，卻要把麥子收進我的倉裡。’”

en: He put another parable before them, saying, "The kingdom of heaven is like a grain of mustard seed that a man took and sowed in his field.
zh: 耶穌又對他們講了另外一個比喻，說：“天國好像一粒芥菜種，人拿去把它種在田裡。

en: It is the smallest of all seeds, but when it has grown it is larger than all the garden plants and becomes a tree, so that the birds of the air come and make nests in its branches."
zh: 它是種子中最小的，但長大了，卻比其他的蔬菜都大，成為一棵樹，甚至天空的飛鳥也來在它的枝頭搭窩。”

en: He told them another parable. "The kingdom of heaven is like leaven that a woman took and hid in three measures of flour, till it was all leavened."
zh: 他對他們講了另一個比喻：“天國好像麵酵，婦女拿去放在三斗麵裡，直到全團發起來。”

en: All these things Jesus said to the crowds in parables; indeed, he said nothing to them without a parable.
zh: 耶穌用比喻向群眾講了這一切，他所講的，沒有不用比喻的。

en: This was to fulfill what was spoken by the prophet: "I will open my mouth in parables; I will utter what has been hidden since the foundation of the world."
zh: 這就應驗了先知所說的： “我要開口用比喻， 把創世以來隱祕的事說出來。”

en: Then he left the crowds and went into the house. And his disciples came to him, saying, "Explain to us the parable of the weeds of the field."
zh: 耶穌離開群眾，進到屋裡，門徒前來問他：“請你給我們解釋田裡稗子的比喻。”

en: He answered, "The one who sows the good seed is the Son of Man.
zh: 他回答：“那撒好種子的是人子，

en: The field is the world, and the good seed is the children of the kingdom. The weeds are the sons of the evil one,
zh: 田就是世界，好種子就是屬天國的人，稗子就是屬那惡者的人，

en: and the enemy who sowed them is the devil. The harvest is the close of the age, and the reapers are angels.
zh: 撒稗子的仇敵是魔鬼，收割的時候是這世代的終結，收割的工人是天使。

en: Just as the weeds are gathered and burned with fire, so will it be at the close of the age.
zh: 稗子怎樣被拔掉用火焚燒，在這世代終結的時候，也是一樣。

en: The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will gather out of his kingdom all causes of sin and all law-breakers,
zh: 那時，人子要差派他的使者，把一切使人犯罪的事和不法之徒，從他的國中拔掉，

en: and throw them into the fiery furnace. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
zh: 丟進火爐，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。

en: Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. He who has ears, let him hear.
zh: 那時，義人在他們父的國中，要像太陽一樣的照耀。有耳的，就應當聽。

en: "The kingdom of heaven is like treasure hidden in a field, which a man found and covered up. Then in his joy he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field.
zh: “天國好像藏在田裡的寶貝，有人發現了，就把它藏起來，高高興興地離去，變賣了他的一切，來買那田地。

en: "Again, the kingdom of heaven is like a merchant in search of fine pearls,
zh: “天國好像一個商人，搜羅寶貴的珍珠。

en: who, on finding one pearl of great value, went and sold all that he had and bought it.
zh: 他發現了一顆極貴重的珍珠，就離去，變賣了他的一切，來買那顆珍珠。

en: "Again, the kingdom of heaven is like a net that was thrown into the sea and gathered fish of every kind.
zh: “天國又好像一個網，撒在海裡，網到各樣的魚。

en: When it was full, men drew it ashore and sat down and sorted the good into containers but threw away the bad.
zh: 網滿了之後，人就把網拉上岸，坐下來把好的揀出，收藏起來，不好的就丟在外面。

en: So it will be at the close of the age. The angels will come out and separate the evil from the righteous
zh: 這世代終結的時候，也是一樣。那時天使要出去，把惡人從義人中分別出來。

en: and throw them into the fiery furnace. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
zh: 丟進火爐，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。

en: "Have you understood all these things?" They said to him, "Yes."
zh: “這一切你們明白嗎？”他們回答：“明白。”

en: And he said to them, "Therefore every scribe who has been trained for the kingdom of heaven is like a master of a house, who brings out of his treasure what is new and what is old."
zh: 耶穌說：“所以，每一個作天國門徒的經學家，就像家主從寶庫中拿出新和舊的東西來。”

en: And when Jesus had finished these parables, he went away from there,
zh: 耶穌講完了這些比喻，就離開那地方。

en: and coming to his hometown he taught them in their synagogue, so that they were astonished, and said, "Where did this man get this wisdom and these mighty works?
zh: 他回到自己的家鄉，在會堂裡教導人，眾人都驚奇，說：“這個人的智慧和能力是從哪裡來的呢？

en: Is not this the carpenter's son? Is not his mother called Mary? And are not his brothers James and Joseph and Simon and Judas?
zh: 他不是木匠的兒子嗎？他母親不是馬利亞，他弟弟不是雅各、約瑟、西門和猶大嗎？

en: And are not all his sisters with us? Where then did this man get all these things?"
zh: 他妹妹不是都在我們這裡嗎？他這一切是從哪裡來的呢？”

en: And they took offense at him. But Jesus said to them, "A prophet is not without honor except in his hometown and in his own household."
zh: 他們就厭棄耶穌。耶穌對他們說：“先知除了在本鄉本家之外，沒有不受人尊敬的。”

en: And he did not do many mighty works there, because of their unbelief.
zh: 因為他們不信，他就不在那裡多行神蹟了。
